title: The Heat Mirage
lines: You walk for hours toward the patch of green, but it never gets any closer. It shimmers and shifts, mocking you.
The heat is intensified by the violet sky. You begin to hear voices on the wind—the voices of everyone you left behind in the village.
Your vision blurs. You realize you are walking in circles.

options.desc: 1. Blink and focus your mind (Go back)
2. Use your flashlight's beam to cut through the haze
3. Fall to your knees and try to drink the sand
